label: strong

card.title: clamp() and lerp() math helpers
card.description: Two small numeric helpers for the chart layout code.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed, no deps. clamp(v,min,max); lerp(a,b,t). Guard inverted bounds. Tested with edge cases.
isc: Exports clamp(v, min, max) constraining v to [min, max]
Exports lerp(a, b, t) linear interpolation
clamp handles min > max gracefully (returns a defined, documented result)
Tests cover in-range, below-min, above-max, and t=0/0.5/1

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports clamp(v, min, max) constraining v to [min, max]
Exports lerp(a, b, t) linear interpolation
clamp handles min > max gracefully (returns a defined, documented result)
